item.title: Photographer Prasenjeet Yadav captured this video a few years ago in Himachal Pradesh
item.description: A snow leopard has ventured close to Yadav's camera trap and appears to be examining its reflection in the lens.

item.description: Edit: Did not expect this to blow up. It's nice to see that love has a place here. Hope no one's eyes bled too badly. Support trans kids!
item.dc:creator: NoelleFrost

item.title: Nursing dump
item.description:
It’s your favorite neighborhood ER nurse coming at you post-shift for some memes to get you through those 12 hours!
Any bedside procedure
AKI and UTIs all day
Honestly, I have to put the complaints in quotes or else the docs don’t believe me
Longest couple of seconds of your life!
B52s all around!
and their skin is great!
Mid-shift selfie!
And which bathrooms are safe to....use
WE?DONT?BELIEVE?YOU - nor should you lie to your nurses, we’ve definitely heard worse and only are there to help. Always remember - be nice to your nurses!!
item.dc:creator: TheReptilianAgenda

item.title: Kids are the worst. Let's dump about it.

.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.

.

.
Hysterectomy handled that possibility.
.

.
.
.
.
Cute...?
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Accurate.
.
.
Fucking brilliant.
.
.
Cat tax! Thank you for coming to my Ted talk.

item.title: Catra Cosplay, then and now!
item.description: The first time I was ever in Catra vs the most recent!! The changes may seem subtle, but my insides are completely different too ❤️ I’m happier than I’ve ever been with new life, jobs, and love, so I really do feel like season 5 Catra ehehe

item.title: Respect
item.description: Incase I die fighting and defending invasion of my country.Please box me up and lay me to rest in the heroes cemetery. Put my medals on my chest,tell my mom I did my best. Tell my little sis not to be upset; her big sis will not rise after this sunset. Tell my family not to cry; coz I’m a soldier born to die... Glory be to Ukraine ??
item.dc:creator: xQuatiqXraqx

item.title: Feeling a bit ranty about people idolizing "military grade" gear in survival and bushcrafting communities...
item.description: Military Grade apparently means two different things depending on who you ask! Either robust OR built to minimum standards by the lowest bidder. Thoughts? Edit: People seem to think this is a knock off... It's literally the exact NSN number, make, and model of the knife I was issued. I've seen them break in the field literally dozens of times. It's not Chinese, it's an Ontario, but it was just made to meet the minimum requirements of the contract. That's capitalism baby! Most Viral Edit: YES! Thank you for the many voices, comments, and inputs. I love the community vibe here which is why I've been a member for over 10 years. If you want to bring some of that community over to my channel it'd be greatly appreciated. We're always looking for more voices and people looking to learn about homesteading and survival. I reply to every comment on every video (on YT) so it's like having your own personal survival expert 24/7. Here it is: https://www.youtube.com/followthecompassnorth
item.dc:creator: LiberalViking
